heading: Republican Policy Committee
label: 5162 Republican Policy Committee
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74a–13 of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2005, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established in the House of Representatives an office to be known as the Republican Policy Committee, which shall have such responsibilities as may be assigned by the Speaker of the House of Representatives (or, if the Speaker is not a member of the Republican Party, the Minority Leader of the House of Representatives).

children.heading: Salaries and expenses
children.label: b Salaries and expenses
children.text: There shall be a lump sum allowance for the salaries and expenses of the Republican Policy Committee, which shall be treated as a category of House leadership offices for purposes of , and which shall be obligated and expended as directed by the Speaker (or, if the Speaker is not a member of the Republican party, the Minority Leader).section 5507(c) of this title

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: c Applicability
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2005 and each succeeding fiscal year.
